51.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Jibril (peace be upon him) came to me and said: O Muhammad, command your companions to raise their voices with the talbiya, for it is one of the rites of Hajj."'
51.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Jibril (alayhis salam) datang kepadaku dan berkata: Wahai Muhammad, perintahkan sahabat-sahabatmu untuk mengeraskan suara talbiyah, karena itu adalah salah satu syiar haji."'

52.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Whoever provides for a fighter in the way of Allah, he has fought; and whoever takes care of the family of a fighter in his absence, he has fought."'
52.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Barangsiapa yang membekali seorang mujahid di jalan Allah, maka ia telah berjihad; dan barangsiapa yang mengurus keluarga mujahid saat ia tidak ada, maka ia pun telah berjihad."'

53.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I will observe the prayer of the Messenger of Allah ß tonight.' He rested his head on the threshold or edge of his tent. The Messenger of Allah ß prayed two light rak'ahs, then two long rak'ahs, then two rak'ahs in between, then two rak'ahs somewhat shorter, then two rak'ahs somewhat shorter again, then two rak'ahs, then he prayed Witr — making thirteen rak'ahs in all.
53.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku akan memperhatikan shalat Rasulullah ß malam ini.' Ia menyandarkan kepalanya di ambang pintu atau tepi tendanya. Rasulullah ß shalat dua raka'at ringan, kemudian dua raka'at panjang, kemudian dua raka'at pertengahan, kemudian dua raka'at agak pendek, kemudian dua raka'at lebih pendek lagi, kemudian dua raka'at, kemudian shalat Witir — seluruhnya tiga belas raka'at.'

54.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'Whoever equips a warrior (ghazi), he has taken part in the fighting; and whoever takes care of a warrior's family in his absence and does good to them, he has taken part in the fighting.'
54.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang membekali seorang pejuang (ghazi), maka ia telah ikut berperang; dan barangsiapa yang menjaga keluarga seorang pejuang dengan baik saat ia tidak ada, maka ia pun telah ikut berperang.'

55.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Do not prevent the female servants of Allah from the mosques, and let them go out without wearing fragrance."'
55.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Janganlah kalian melarang hamba-hamba perempuan Allah dari masjid-masjid, dan biarlah mereka keluar tanpa memakai wewangian."'

56.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'Shall I not tell you of the best of witnesses? He is the one who presents his testimony before being asked for it.'
56.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Maukah aku beritahu kalian tentang sebaik-baik saksi? Dialah yang menghadirkan kesaksiannya sebelum diminta.'

57.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Were it not that I would burden my community, I would have commanded them to use the miswak (toothstick) before every prayer."'
57.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Seandainya aku tidak memberatkan umatku, niscaya aku akan memerintahkan mereka untuk bersiwak sebelum setiap shalat."'

58.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ß forbid plunder and snatching.
58.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ß melarang perampasan dan pencurian.

59.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß was asked about a lost item (luqata). He said: 'Announce it for a year. If its owner comes, give it to him; otherwise it belongs to you.' He was asked about stray sheep. He said: 'It belongs to you, your brother, or the wolf.' He was asked about stray camels. He said: 'Why does that concern you? It has its water pouches and its hooves, and it will drink water and eat leaves until its owner finds it.'
59.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß ditanya tentang barang temuan (luqatah). Beliau bersabda: 'Umumkan selama setahun. Jika pemiliknya datang, berikan kepadanya; jika tidak, itu milikmu.' Beliau ditanya tentang kambing tersesat. Beliau bersabda: 'Itu milikmu, saudaramu, atau serigala.' Beliau ditanya tentang unta tersesat. Beliau bersabda: 'Apa urusanmu dengan itu? Ia memiliki kantong airnya dan kukunya, ia akan minum air dan makan dedaunan hingga pemiliknya menemukannya.'

60.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Whoever provides food for a fasting person to break his fast, he will have a reward like his, without anything being reduced from the fasting person's reward."'
60.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Barangsiapa yang memberi makan orang yang berpuasa untuk berbuka, maka ia akan mendapat pahala seperti pahala orang yang berpuasa tersebut, tanpa mengurangi sedikit pun pahala orang yang berpuasa itu."'

61.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Messenger of Allah ß that he said: 'The Quraysh, the Ansar, Aslam, and Ghifar — they are my protectors (mawali) and no one else.'
61.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Rasulullah ß bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Quraisy, Anshar, Aslam, dan Ghifar — mereka adalah pelindungku (mawali) dan bukan yang lain.'

62.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ß say: "Whoever touches his private part, let him perform ablution (wudu)."'
62.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Barangsiapa yang menyentuh kemaluannya, hendaklah ia berwudhu."'

63.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß distributed sacrificial animals among his companions. He gave me a young male goat aged one year. I came to him and said: "O Messenger of Allah, he gave me a young male goat aged one year." The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Sacrifice it, for it is valid."'
63.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß membagi-bagikan hewan kurban di antara para sahabatnya. Beliau memberiku kambing jantan muda berusia satu tahun. Aku mendatangi beliau dan berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, beliau memberi kami kambing jantan muda berusia satu tahun." Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Sembelihlah, karena itu sah."'

64.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Whoever prays two rak'ahs without being inattentive in them, Allah will forgive his past sins."'
64.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Barangsiapa yang shalat dua raka'at tanpa lalai di dalamnya, Allah akan mengampuni dosa-dosanya yang telah lalu."'

65.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he made eleven prostrations (sujud al-tilawa) with the Messenger of Allah ß, among them the one in Surah al-Najm.
65.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia melakukan sebelas sujud (sujud tilawah) bersama Rasulullah ß, di antaranya adalah sujud dalam Surah al-Najm.

66.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "On the Day of Resurrection you will be called by your names and the names of your fathers, so choose good names for yourselves."'
66.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Pada Hari Kiamat kalian akan dipanggil dengan nama-nama kalian dan nama-nama ayah kalian, maka pilihlah nama-nama yang baik untuk diri kalian."'

67.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß said: 'Your love of a thing makes you blind and deaf to its faults.'
67.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß bersabda: 'Kecintaanmu terhadap sesuatu membuatmu buta dan tuli terhadap kekurangannya.'

68.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß said: 'Part of a man's wisdom is moderation in his livelihood.'
68.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß bersabda: 'Sebagian dari kecerdasan seseorang adalah bersikap moderat dalam kehidupannya.'

69.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We were with the Messenger of Allah ß on a journey on an intensely hot day, and one of us would place his hand on his head due to the intense heat, yet none of us was fasting except the Messenger of Allah ß and Abdullah ibn Rawaha.'
69.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami bersama Rasulullah ß dalam perjalanan pada hari yang sangat panas, dan salah seorang di antara kami meletakkan tangannya di atas kepalanya karena panasnya yang terik, namun tidak ada seorang pun di antara kami yang berpuasa kecuali Rasulullah ß dan Abdullah ibn Rawaha.'

70.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'A man entered the mosque of Damascus and said: "O Allah, comfort my loneliness, have mercy on my being far from home, and provide me with a righteous companion." Abu al-Darda' heard him and said: "If you are truthful, then I am more happy about what you said than you are. I heard the Messenger of Allah ß say: "The scholars are the heirs of the Prophets, and the Prophets did not leave behind dinars or dirhams, rather they left behind knowledge. Whoever gains it, gains a great fortune.""'
70.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Seorang pria masuk ke masjid Damaskus dan berkata: "Ya Allah, hiburlah kesendirianku, kasihanilah jauhku dari kampung halaman, dan berilah aku teman duduk yang shaleh." Abu al-Darda' mendengarnya dan berkata: "Jika engkau jujur, maka aku lebih bahagia dengan apa yang engkau ucapkan daripada dirimu. Aku mendengar Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Para ulama adalah pewaris para Nabi, dan para Nabi tidak mewariskan dinar maupun dirham, melainkan mereka mewariskan ilmu. Barangsiapa yang mengambilnya, ia mendapatkan keuntungan yang besar.""'

71.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw us with the Messenger of Allah ß on some of his journeys on an intensely hot day, so hot that a man would place his hand on his head due to the heat. None of us was fasting except the Messenger of Allah ß and Abdullah ibn Rawaha.'
71.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat kami bersama Rasulullah ß dalam beberapa perjalanannya pada hari yang sangat panas, begitu panasnya sehingga seseorang meletakkan tangannya di atas kepalanya karena kepanasan. Tidak ada seorang pun di antara kami yang berpuasa kecuali Rasulullah ß dan Abdullah ibn Rawaha.'

72.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß was asked about what rulers give. He said: "Whatever Allah gives you without you asking for it or coveting it, take it and keep it as wealth."'
72.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß ditanya tentang apa yang diberikan oleh penguasa. Beliau bersabda: "Apa pun yang Allah berikan kepadamu tanpa kamu memintanya atau menginginkannya, ambillah dan jadikanlah sebagai harta."'

73.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that one day he came home angry. She asked: 'What is the matter with you?' He said: 'By Allah, I do not recognize in them anything from the ways of Muhammad ß except that they pray together.'
73.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa pada suatu hari ia pulang ke rumah dalam keadaan marah. Istrinya bertanya: 'Ada apa denganmu?' Ia berkata: 'Demi Allah, aku tidak mengenali pada mereka satu pun dari ajaran Muhammad ß kecuali bahwa mereka shalat berjamaah.'

74.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß vomited and broke his fast. He said: 'I then met Thawban in the mosque of the Messenger of Allah ß and asked him about that. He said: "He is right — I poured the water for him for his ablution."'
74.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß muntah dan membatalkan puasanya. Ia berkata: 'Aku kemudian bertemu Tsauban di masjid Rasulullah ß dan menanyakannya. Ia berkata: "Dia benar — aku yang menuangkan air untuknya untuk berwudhu."'

75.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Shall I not tell you of something better than fasting, prayer, and charity?" They said: "Of course, O Messenger of Allah." He said: "Reconciling between people. Corrupting relations between people is the destroyer."'
75.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Maukah aku beritahu kalian tentang sesuatu yang lebih baik dari puasa, shalat, dan sedekah?" Mereka berkata: "Tentu, wahai Rasulullah." Beliau bersabda: "Mendamaikan hubungan antar manusia. Merusak hubungan antar manusia adalah penghancur."'

76.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß saw a pregnant woman at the entrance of a tent. The Messenger of Allah ß said: 'Perhaps the one with her has committed cohabitation with a captive woman.' They said: 'Yes.' He said: 'I was minded to curse him with a curse that would follow him into his grave.'
76.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß melihat seorang wanita hamil di pintu masuk sebuah tenda. Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Mungkin orang yang bersamanya telah mencampuri seorang wanita tawanan.' Mereka berkata: 'Ya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku hampir melaknatnya dengan laknat yang akan mengikutinya ke dalam kuburnya.'

77.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß said: 'Would any of you find it difficult to recite a third of the Quran in one night?' They asked: 'How can one do that, or who is capable of that?' He said: '"Say: He is Allah, the One (Surah al-Ikhlas)" is equivalent to a third of the Quran.'
77.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß bersabda: 'Apakah salah seorang dari kalian merasa kesulitan untuk membaca sepertiga Al-Quran dalam satu malam?' Mereka bertanya: 'Bagaimana seseorang bisa melakukan itu, atau siapa yang mampu melakukannya?' Beliau bersabda: '"Katakanlah: Dia adalah Allah, Yang Maha Esa (Surah al-Ikhlas)" setara dengan sepertiga Al-Quran.'

78.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß was asked about eating hyena meat. A man present said: 'I heard Abu al-Darda' narrate from the Prophet ß that it is permissible and it is considered game.'
78.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß ditanya tentang memakan daging hyena. Seorang pria yang hadir berkata: 'Aku mendengar Abu al-Darda' meriwayatkan dari Nabi ß bahwa itu halal dan dianggap sebagai hewan buruan.'

79.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Umm al-Darda' said to me: "Pray for us with good." I said: "The Messenger of Allah ß used to say: "The prayer of a Muslim for his brother in his absence is answered. At his head there is an angel who has been delegated. Whenever he prays good for his brother, the delegated angel says: Amen, and the same for you.""'
79.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Umm al-Darda' berkata kepadaku: "Doakanlah kami dengan kebaikan." Aku berkata: "Rasulullah ß biasa bersabda: "Doa seorang Muslim untuk saudaranya yang tidak hadir dikabulkan. Di atas kepalanya terdapat malaikat yang ditugaskan. Setiap kali ia mendoakan kebaikan untuk saudaranya, malaikat yang ditugaskan itu mengucapkan: Amin, dan semoga hal yang sama bagimu.""'

80.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man came to stay with him. Abu al-Darda' said: 'Are you staying, so that we may let you graze; or are you departing, so that we may feed your mount?' He said: 'Rather I am departing.' He said: 'Then I will provide you with provisions — if I could find something better I would give that to you instead.' He then narrated a hadith from the Prophet ß.
80.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria datang singgah kepadanya. Abu al-Darda' berkata: 'Apakah kamu menetap, sehingga kami membiarkanmu merumput; atau apakah kamu akan pergi, sehingga kami memberi makan tungganganmu?' Ia berkata: 'Justru aku akan pergi.' Ia berkata: 'Kalau begitu aku akan memberimu bekal — seandainya aku bisa menemukan yang lebih baik, aku pasti memberikannya kepadamu.' Kemudian ia menceritakan sebuah hadith dari Nabi ß.

81.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ß say: "There is not three people in a village or in the open land who do not establish the prayer in congregation, except that the Shaytan has overcome them. Hold fast to the congregation, for the wolf only eats the lone sheep."'
81.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Tidak ada tiga orang di suatu desa atau di tanah terbuka yang tidak mendirikan shalat berjamaah, kecuali Setan telah menguasai mereka. Berpeganglah pada jamaah, karena serigala hanya memakan domba yang sendirian."'

82.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß said: 'Whoever memorizes ten verses from the beginning of Surah al-Kahf will be protected from the Dajjal.'
82.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang menghafal sepuluh ayat dari awal Surah al-Kahf, ia akan dilindungi dari Dajjal.'

83.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß offered sacrifice with two castrated male rams that were a year old and fully grown.'
83.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß berkurban dengan dua ekor domba jantan yang dikebiri, berusia satu tahun dan sudah dewasa penuh.'

84.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß offered sacrifice with two castrated male rams that were a year old.'
84.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß berkurban dengan dua ekor domba jantan yang dikebiri, berusia satu tahun.'

85.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man came to him from Madinah while he was in Damascus, and said: 'What brought you here, O my brother?' He said: 'A hadith that reached me that you narrate from the Messenger of Allah ß.' Abu al-Darda' said: 'You did not come for trade?' He said: 'No.' 'Nor for any other need?' He said: 'No.' He then narrated to him that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'Whoever travels a path seeking knowledge, Allah will make easy for him a path to Paradise. The angels lower their wings for the seeker of knowledge in approval of what he does.'
85.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria datang kepadanya dari Madinah sementara ia berada di Damaskus, dan berkata: 'Apa yang membawamu ke sini, wahai saudaraku?' Ia berkata: 'Sebuah hadith yang sampai kepadaku bahwa engkau meriwayatkannya dari Rasulullah ß.' Abu al-Darda' berkata: 'Kamu tidak datang untuk berdagang?' Ia berkata: 'Tidak.' 'Tidak juga untuk kebutuhan lain?' Ia berkata: 'Tidak.' Kemudian ia menceritakan kepadanya bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang menempuh suatu jalan untuk mencari ilmu, Allah akan memudahkan baginya jalan menuju Surga. Para malaikat merendahkan sayap-sayap mereka bagi penuntut ilmu sebagai tanda persetujuan atas apa yang ia lakukan.'

86.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man whose mother or father or both commanded him to divorce his wife set upon himself the obligation of freeing a hundred slaves if he did so. He came to Abu al-Darda' while he was praying and sat waiting. Abu al-Darda' then narrated a hadith from the Messenger of Allah ß regarding obedience to parents.
86.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria yang ibunya, ayahnya, atau keduanya memerintahkannya untuk menceraikan istrinya mewajibkan dirinya sendiri untuk memerdekakan seratus budak jika ia melakukan hal itu. Ia datang kepada Abu al-Darda' sementara ia sedang shalat dan duduk menunggu. Abu al-Darda' kemudian menceritakan sebuah hadith dari Rasulullah ß mengenai ketaatan kepada orang tua.

87.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß said: 'The example of the one who frees or gives charity at the time of death is like the one who gives a gift after he is full.'
87.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß bersabda: 'Perumpamaan orang yang memerdekakan atau bersedekah saat menjelang kematian adalah seperti orang yang memberikan hadiah setelah kenyang.'

88.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked about where to spend an inheritance bequeathed for charity — to the poor, the fighters, or the destitute. He said: 'I would put it in the path of Allah (jihad), for I heard the Messenger of Allah ß say: "A horse in the path of Allah is the best charity."'
88.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia ditanya tentang di mana menginfakkan warisan yang diwasiatkan untuk sedekah — kepada orang miskin, para pejuang, atau orang yang membutuhkan. Ia berkata: 'Aku akan menempatkannya di jalan Allah (jihad), karena aku mendengar Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Seekor kuda di jalan Allah adalah sedekah terbaik."'

89.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man said: 'O Messenger of Allah, is there a recitation in every prayer?' He said: 'Yes.' A man from the Ansar said: 'That has become obligatory.'
89.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, apakah ada bacaan dalam setiap shalat?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya.' Seorang pria dari Anshar berkata: 'Berarti itu sudah menjadi wajib.'

90.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "No sun ever rises except that two angels are sent alongside it, calling out in a voice that all the inhabitants of the earth can hear except humans and jinn: O people, come to your Lord! What is little but sufficient is better than what is much but distracts from Allah."'
90.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Tidak ada matahari yang terbit kecuali dua malaikat dikirim di sampingnya, berseru dengan suara yang dapat didengar oleh semua penduduk bumi kecuali manusia dan jin: Wahai manusia, kembalilah kepada Tuhanmu! Yang sedikit namun cukup lebih baik dari yang banyak namun melalaikan dari Allah."'

91.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, has predetermined for every servant five things: his lifespan, his deeds, his resting place, his footsteps, and his sustenance."'
91.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Allah Yang Maha Perkasa telah menakdirkan bagi setiap hamba lima hal: ajalnya, amalannya, tempat peristirahatan terakhirnya, jejak langkahnya, dan rezekinya."'

92.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ß say: "Allah has predetermined for every servant five things: his lifespan, his deeds, his resting place, his footsteps, and his sustenance."'
92.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Allah telah menakdirkan bagi setiap hamba lima hal: ajalnya, amalannya, tempat peristirahatannya, jejak langkahnya, dan rezekinya."'

93.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abd al-Rahman ibn Ghanm visited him in Homs and stayed with him for several nights. Abu al-Darda' then decided to accompany him, and they both set out until they came to a village. There they encountered a man who was with them and narrated a hadith from the Messenger of Allah ß.
93.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Abdurrahman ibn Ghanm mengunjunginya di Homs dan tinggal bersamanya selama beberapa malam. Abu al-Darda' kemudian memutuskan untuk menemaninya, dan mereka berdua berangkat hingga tiba di sebuah desa. Di sana mereka bertemu seorang pria yang bersama mereka dan menceritakan hadith dari Rasulullah ß.

94.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'The camp (fustat) of the Muslims on the Day of the Great Battle will be in the Ghuta, near a city called Damascus — which is one of the best cities of Syria.'
94.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Perkemahan (fustat) kaum Muslim pada Hari Pertempuran Besar akan berada di al-Ghuta, di dekat sebuah kota bernama Damaskus — yang merupakan salah satu kota terbaik di Syam.'

95.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man came to him and said: 'My wife is my cousin and I love her, but my mother commands me to divorce her.' He said: 'I will not command you to divorce her, nor will I command you to disobey your mother. But I will tell you what I heard from the Messenger of Allah ß: "The parent is the middle door of Paradise."'
95.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria datang kepadanya dan berkata: 'Istriku adalah sepupu perempuanku dan aku mencintainya, tetapi ibuku memerintahku untuk menceraikannya.' Ia berkata: 'Aku tidak akan memerintahmu untuk menceraikannya, tidak juga memerintahmu untuk mendurhakai ibumu. Tetapi aku akan menceritakan kepadamu apa yang aku dengar dari Rasulullah ß: "Orang tua adalah pintu tengah Surga."'

96.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ß say: "Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, says: "Then We gave the Book as inheritance to those We have chosen from Our servants" (35:32). Among them is the one who wrongs himself (zalim li nafsih), and among them is the one who is moderate (muqtasid), and among them is the one foremost in good deeds (sabiq bil khayrat) by the permission of Allah. These three — all of them — will enter Paradise."'
96.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Allah Yang Maha Perkasa berfirman: "Kemudian Kami wariskan Kitab itu kepada orang-orang yang Kami pilih di antara hamba-hamba Kami" (35:32). Di antara mereka ada yang menzalimi dirinya sendiri (zalim li nafsih), dan di antara mereka ada yang pertengahan (muqtasid), dan di antara mereka ada yang terdepan dalam kebaikan (sabiq bil khayrat) dengan izin Allah. Ketiganya — semuanya — akan masuk Surga."'

97.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ß say: "Indeed headache and fever are part of the soldier of Allah's army — they drive away sins just as a tree loses its leaves in autumn."'
97.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Sesungguhnya sakit kepala dan demam adalah bagian dari tentara Allah — keduanya mengusir dosa-dosa sebagaimana pohon menggugurkan daunnya di musim gugur."'

98.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Whoever bathes on Friday, puts on his clothes, applies perfume if he has any, then walks to the Friday prayer with tranquility, does not step over people, prays what is prescribed for him, then remains silent while the imam speaks — Allah will forgive him from that Friday to the next."'
98.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Barangsiapa yang mandi pada hari Jumat, memakai pakaiannya, menggunakan wewangian jika ia memilikinya, kemudian berjalan menuju shalat Jumat dengan tenang, tidak melangkahi orang-orang, shalat apa yang diwajibkan baginya, kemudian diam sementara imam berbicara — Allah akan mengampuninya dari Jumat itu hingga Jumat berikutnya."'

99.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß sat one day on the pulpit, delivered a sermon to the people, and recited a verse. Ubayy ibn Ka'b was sitting next to me, so I said to him: "O Ubayy, when was this verse revealed?" He refused to speak to me. The Messenger of Allah ß came down from the pulpit, and I said: "O Ubayy, what is the matter with you?" He said: "You gained nothing from your Friday prayer except your idle talk."'
99.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß duduk suatu hari di atas mimbar, berkhotbah kepada orang-orang, dan membacakan sebuah ayat. Ubayy ibn Ka'b duduk di sampingku, maka aku berkata kepadanya: "Wahai Ubayy, kapan ayat ini diturunkan?" Ia menolak untuk berbicara denganku. Rasulullah ß turun dari mimbar, dan aku berkata: "Wahai Ubayy, ada apa denganmu?" Ia berkata: "Kamu tidak mendapat apa pun dari shalat Jumatmu kecuali obrolanmu yang sia-sia."'

100.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ß say: "The camp of the Muslims on the Day of the Great Battle will be in the Ghuta, near a city called Damascus — one of the best cities of Syria."'
100.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Perkemahan kaum Muslim pada Hari Pertempuran Besar akan berada di al-Ghuta, di dekat sebuah kota bernama Damaskus — salah satu kota terbaik di Syam."'
